overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a dimly lit industrial warehouse. The character moves from a narrow corridor through a large open storage area and ascends a metal staircase. The environment features metal walkways, industrial shelving, and artificial lighting typical of a modern video game.

events.description: character exits narrow corridor through metal doorway into larger warehouse space

agents.ego_description: ascending initial staircase and moving through doorway into warehouse area

hospital-style bed with white sheets against the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, dimly lit corridor where the character ascends a short staircase. A medical bed sits against the left wall. The character moves through a metal doorway, transitioning from the confined corridor into a larger warehouse space, with metal shelving becoming visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open warehouse floor with industrial storage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across warehouse floor toward staircase on the right side

entered.detail: large open floor space with metal plating and industrial markings
large metal crates and containers stacked in the distance
thick black cables running across the floor
metal staircase with railings leading to upper level
wooden and metal crates piled on the left side
red fabric covering equipment on the right

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the open warehouse floor, surrounded by industrial storage containers and overhead structures. Black cables snake across the metal floor plates. The character approaches a metal staircase on the right side of the space, passing stacked crates and equipment covered with red tarps.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal staircase to upper catwalk level

events.description: character begins ascending metal staircase to upper warehouse level

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs to reach upper catwalk platform

entered.detail: elevated metal walkway with safety railings
green metal barrels stacked on the left side of stairs
vertical ladder attached to wall on upper level

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the metal staircase, moving from the warehouse floor to the upper catwalk level. Green industrial barrels are visible on the left landing, while the open warehouse space falls away below. The character reaches the top platform where additional industrial shelving and a metal ladder are visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined, dimly lit corridor into a vast industrial warehouse and finally ascends to an elevated catwalk. It begins with the character climbing a short staircase past a medical bed before passing through a metal doorway that opens the space into a large storage area. As the camera moves across the metal floor plates, it glides past snaking black cables and crates covered in red tarps toward a staircase on the right. The scene then shifts upward as the character ascends the stairs, leaving the warehouse floor behind and passing green industrial barrels on a landing. Finally, the movement concludes on the top platform, where the perspective overlooks the open warehouse space and reveals additional shelving and a metal ladder.
